script_text: Every fact book is mostly about one big idea.
That big idea is called the main topic.
The smaller facts we learn are called key details.
Apples can be red, green, or yellow. They grow on trees. Apples are a healthy snack.
What is the main topic? Apples!
Key details? Colors, where they grow, and healthy.
Firefighters wear special gear. They drive fire trucks. They put out fires and help people.
Key details? Gear, fire trucks, and helping.
Ask yourself: what word shows up the most? That is usually the main topic!
Now you are ready to find the main topic and key details!
